name: Workbench Behavioral Eval v1
description: First behavioral eval suite. Exercises agent task completion on known-good workbench fixtures (Go CLI, Python API, DevOps scripts). Each case sets up a broken state, runs a scoring script, and checks whether the fix is correct. Compatible with --baseline-mode=both for A/B comparison.

cases.title: Fix off-by-one bug in Go Multiply function
cases.objective: Agent must identify and fix an off-by-one error in calc.go that causes test failures. Tests the core bug-fix workflow.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/go-01/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && cp -r evals/workbench/go-cli/* "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/go-01/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Implement Divide function with error handling
cases.objective: Agent must implement a stubbed Divide function with proper divide-by-zero error handling and add tests. Tests feature implementation workflow.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/go-03/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && cp -r evals/workbench/go-cli/* "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/go-03/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Fix command injection vulnerability in Go CLI
cases.objective: Agent must identify and fix a command injection vulnerability (exec.Command with unsanitized input). Tests security-aware coding.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/go-05/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && cp -r evals/workbench/go-cli/* "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/go-05/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Fix broken 404 response in Python API
cases.objective: Agent must fix a broken GET endpoint that returns wrong status for missing items. Tests API debugging workflow.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/py-01/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && rsync -a --exclude=.venv evals/workbench/python-api/ "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/py-01/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Fix SQL injection vulnerability in Python API
cases.objective: Agent must identify and fix an f-string SQL query that enables SQL injection. Tests security-aware Python coding.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/py-04/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && rsync -a --exclude=.venv evals/workbench/python-api/ "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/py-04/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Fix missing error handling in deploy script
cases.objective: Agent must add error handling (set -euo pipefail, validation) to a deploy script that silently succeeds on bad input. Tests DevOps safety awareness.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/ops-01/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && cp -r evals/workbench/devops/* "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/ops-01/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Add missing test coverage for Go store package
cases.objective: Agent must add tests for Delete and Get (missing key) operations. Tests the test-writing workflow and coverage awareness.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/go-02/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && cp -r evals/workbench/go-cli/* "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/go-02/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Refactor high-complexity Go function below CC threshold
cases.objective: Agent must refactor a CC-15 function to below CC 10 while maintaining behavior. Tests refactoring discipline.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/go-04/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && cp -r evals/workbench/go-cli/* "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/go-04/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Add input validation to Python API models
cases.objective: Agent must add Pydantic validation (price > 0, non-empty name) and corresponding tests. Tests defensive coding.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/py-02/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && rsync -a --exclude=.venv evals/workbench/python-api/ "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/py-02/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Add pagination to Python API list endpoint
cases.objective: Agent must add page/size query parameters and paginated response. Tests feature implementation workflow.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/py-03/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && rsync -a --exclude=.venv evals/workbench/python-api/ "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/py-03/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Fix log rotation crash on empty directory
cases.objective: Agent must add graceful handling for empty log directories. Tests edge-case awareness.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/ops-02/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && cp -r evals/workbench/devops/* "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/ops-02/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"

cases.title: Add retry logic to healthcheck script
cases.objective: Agent must add retry with backoff to a single-attempt healthcheck. Tests reliability engineering.

inputs.shell: TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && bash evals/workbench/tasks/ops-03/setup.sh "$TMPDIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && cp -r evals/workbench/devops/* "$TMPDIR/" && bash evals/workbench/tasks/ops-03/score.sh "$TMPDIR" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"
